---
title: "Duke basketball"
author: "Pat Rankin"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### Duke Basketball

```{r}
  
# Create scatter plot for 2 numerical variables

library(tidyverse)
names(team_Duke_2026)
  
str(team_Duke_2026)

  
```

```{r}
team_Duke_2026 |> 
  ggplot(aes(field_goals_attempted, field_goal_pct,
             colour = largest_lead))+
  geom_point(size = 3)+
  theme_bw()
```
